name: Sadéqa
author: AGP
description: Sadéqa -- a two-row Ethiopian mancala of the Selus family, played by the Jimma and written up by Ralf Gering (Abstract Games #16, 2003). Sow counter-clockwise in multi-lap fashion across 20 holes (four seeds each). Land the last seed on an opponent hole of three to spear a warana you own; land it in an opponent's warana to capture and earn a bonus move. Score = captured seeds plus seeds in your warana; most points wins, an equal split is a draw.
